generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer deployed inside incubator for temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer deployed inside incubator for temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ communication server from low-level driver"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2
]

instance IncubatorTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IncubatorTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance IncubatorThermalModel1 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based thermal dynamic simulation model for incubator temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance IncubatorThermalModel2 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based thermal dynamic simulation model for incubator temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model for geometric representation of incubator components"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for parameter estimation using sensor data and thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in incubator temperature control"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing incubator operation parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for supervising and adjusting incubator operations based on DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and performance via sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, PerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of physical behavior using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in incubator operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of current system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of incubator operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalSettingsInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for adjusting physical twin operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational safety against predefined thresholds"
]

instance PerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of system performance metrics in real-time"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature behavior based on thermal models"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies in incubator temperature control"
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational state estimation from sensor data"
]

instance OptimalSettingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended operational parameters for optimal performance"
]

instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed heating levels based on DT analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for warming contents inside incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Component for distributing heat evenly within incubator enclosure"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Device that processes commands from Digital Twin to actuate heatbed with safety constraints"
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical system being twinned, an incubator for temperature-controlled environments"
    base:contains DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, Heatbed, Fan, Controller
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment models with best parameter estimates; monitors validate model fidelity by checking system performance against safety and optimization criteria, triggering human or algorithmic interventions upon violation detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT's technical connection utilizes a RabbitMQ message broker deployed on a Raspberry Pi, leveraging its built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities for wireless communication. The network architecture is centralized around the Pi, handling data exchange between physical devices and digital components through RabbitMQ without explicit specification of additional protocols."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "In order keep the device in a safe state, a safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver. Additionally, insulation is implemented to minimise the potential impact of the environment."
]
